page_title: Change my address – Immigration and citizenship - Canada.ca
h1: Change my address – Immigration and citizenship

h2: If you’re in the United States
If you’re outside Canada and the United States
h3: Step 1 – Check if you can use the Change of address service
If you can’t use the Change of address service

sections.heading: Step 1 – Check if you can use the Change of address service
items: The changes should appear in your file within 5 business days .
You can use this service if you meet all of the following criteria:
bullets: You applied on paper .
Your case is being processed in Canada .
Your address is in Canada .
You’re moving within 3 weeks or have already moved.

You must also have either sponsored a member of the family class applied for permanent residence from within Canada applied for a permanent resident card applied for Canadian citizenship (for yourself or for a person adopted by a Canadian citizen) applied for proof of citizenship (citizenship certificate) applied to renounce or resume Canadian citizenship, or applied for a search of citizenship records
sponsored a member of the family class
applied for permanent residence from within Canada
applied for a permanent resident card
applied for Canadian citizenship (for yourself or for a person adopted by a Canadian citizen)
applied for proof of citizenship (citizenship certificate)
applied to renounce or resume Canadian citizenship, or
applied for a search of citizenship records

sections.heading: Step 2 – Gather your documents
items: You may need documents related to your application, including 1 or more of these:
bullets: a copy of your application
your fee receipts
any letter or official document we issued to you

sections.heading: Step 3 – Change your address
items: Use the service to tell us about your change of address.
If you have an immigration application in process and a representative on file (paid or unpaid), the mailing address in your file will be your representative’s address.
Go to the Change of address service

sections.heading: If you can’t use the Change of address service
items: Use the web form if you can’t use the Change of address service. Follow the instructions and include all the details we ask for.

sections.heading: If you’re in the United States
Immigration application
items: Contact the Canadian visa office for your region to change your address.

sections.heading: Citizenship application
items: Use the web form to tell us your new address. This includes applications
bullets: to become a Canadian citizen
for a citizenship certificate (proof of citizenship)
for search of citizenship records
to renounce (give up) your Canadian citizenship

sections.heading: Refugee and asylum application
items: Send your change of address to the Backlog Reduction Office in Vancouver if you applied for
bullets: a pre-removal risk assessment, or
permanent residence based on humanitarian and compassionate grounds

sections.heading: If you’re outside Canada and the United States
Immigration application
items: Contact the Canadian visa office for your region to change your address.

sections.heading: Refugee and asylum application
items: Send your change of address to the Backlog Reduction Office in Vancouver if you applied for
bullets: a pre-removal risk assessment
permanent residence based on humanitarian and compassionate grounds
